services.title: Community Services
services.subtitle: Tools serving the community to facilitate Bitcoin usage in Cuba through free, sovereign, and accessible solutions for everyone.

buy.title: Buy Bitcoin without KYC
buy.subtitle: Peer-to-peer platforms to buy Bitcoin privately

pow.title: Proof of Work
pow.impact_subtitle: Our work is measured in actions, not words. This is the result of our collective effort.

lightning.title: Connect with Cuba Bitcoin through Lightning
lightning.subtitle: Have a Lightning node? Join our network by opening a direct channel with the Cuba Bitcoin node. By connecting, you help strengthen Bitcoin infrastructure in Cuba and improve Lightning Network connectivity.
lightning.benefit_3: Be part of a decentralized and resilient network

donations.title: Support the Community
donations.subtitle: If you value our educational and community work, you can contribute with a donation. Everything is managed through our BTCPay Server, with no intermediaries.
donations.impact_1: Organize free events and training spaces
donations.impact_2: Maintain services: LNbits, BTCPay Server, Cashu Mint, and Lightning node
donations.impact_5: Bring Bitcoin to all of Cuba
donations.gratitude: With your support, we continue spreading financial freedom and empowering more people.
donations.thanks: Thank you for being part of this movement!

multimedia.title: Multimedia
multimedia.subtitle: Exclusive educational content produced by Cuba Bitcoin to promote Bitcoin adoption
multimedia.description: Documentaries, interviews, educational courses, and podcasts promoting Bitcoin adoption and knowledge in Cuba and worldwide.

nostr.title: Connect with Cuba Bitcoin on Nostr
nostr.subtitle: Join the decentralized communication protocol and follow us on the social network of the future
nostr.description: Nostr is a simple and open protocol that enables truly decentralized social networks, censorship-resistant and user-controlled.
nostr.feature_1_desc: No one can block your content
nostr.feature_2_desc: Your identity, your data, your connections
nostr.nip05_desc: Get your custom NIP05 with the domain
nostr.nip05_cta: and become an official community member.
